ds_des_source: NOT_AVAILABLE — LRG2 not covered by DES
digitization_note: Color-based extraction from downloaded PNG (red markers, RGB 240/0/0). wp from fig4 top-right; HSC ESD from fig4 bottom-right. Axis: log-x linear-y; y-axis shows rp*wp [h^-2 Mpc^2] and R*DeltaSigma [10^6 M_sun/pc]. Error bars from extent of colored pixels per bin. Script: data/lange2025_desi_dr1/digitize_figures.py. Accuracy ~5-10% (limited by pixel resolution ~0.5-1 data unit per pixel).
